creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: bapt
Date: Sun Jul 24 09:38:09 UTC 2016
New revision: 418994
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/418994

Log:
  Update to 1.4

  * Fix a bug in rendering nested block lists
  * Fix build with GCC 6 and other minor warnings
  * Build a static library too
  * Significantly improve documentation
  * Improvement of mkd2man
  * Add an amalgamation (C sources to include directly in a project)
    (not included in the port though)

  PR:		211330
  Submitted by:	Natacha Port? <natbsd@instinctive.eu> (maintainer & upstream)

Changes:
  head/textproc/libsoldout/Makefile
  head/textproc/libsoldout/distinfo
  head/textproc/libsoldout/files/
  head/textproc/libsoldout/pkg-plist
